# OpenPaw

> Local-first AI agent orchestration platform.

OpenPaw is a platform for building and managing AI agents with sovereign personality files, tiered memory systems, and multi-channel orchestration.

## Core Components
- **Client**: React 18 frontend with 16 pages (Agents, Skills, MCPs, Channels, Workspaces, etc.).
- **Server**: Node.js backend with Agent Engine, Model Router, and SQLite persistence.
- **Engines**: Voice (STT/TTS), Web Search, Browser Automation.
- **Protocols**: MCP (Model Context Protocol), A2A (Agent-to-Agent).

## Key Files
- [README.md] (file:///c:/Users/USER/Desktop/OpenPaw/README.md): Project overview and setup.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md] (file:///c:/Users/USER/Desktop/OpenPaw/ARCHITECTURE.md): Technical deep-dive.
- [client/src/pages/]: Frontend page implementations.
- [server/src/db/schema.ts]: Database structure.
- [server/src/agents/AgentEngine.ts]: Core reasoning logic.

## Capabilities
- Multi-provider LLM support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama).
- Tiered memory (Hot/Episodic/Semantic).
- Channel bridges to Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp.
- Scheduled autonomous tasks (Cron Jobs).
- Hierarchical task orchestration in Workspaces.
